The Corcovado
A11-G3-051  ·  Guanacaste  ·  Solid Hardwood

120.5" (10' 0½")
Width L × R
46½" × 49½"
Seats
10 – 12
Moisture
8–10% MC · Double kiln-dried
Surface
120-grit · Epoxy fills
Slab character
Deep, warm tones with dramatic curl figure. Hero void and crack along the left edge, flanked by golden sapwood live-edges on both sides. A singular, museum-quality piece that anchors any room.
